articles.title: Petrol, Diesel & CNG Fresh Prices Announced: Check City-Wise Rates For May 29
articles.description: Petrol, diesel and CNG prices stay unchanged on May 29, 2026, check latest fuel rates across major Indian cities and where petrol and diesel are costliest

articles.title: Major Financial Shifts: Disney Challenges, Anthropic Surges, and Oil Warnings
articles.description: The Financial Times reports on Disney's defense against US regulatory actions, Anthropic's significant funding to surpass OpenAI, Chevron's warning on rising oil prices, and Amazon's move to dismantle an AI leaderboard. These stories highlight ongoing tensions, tech advancements, and economic forecasts within the business sector.

articles.title: Outside View: A gas tax holiday is good politics but bad economics
articles.description: Even as the U.S. and Iran wrestle over an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, surging gas prices have turned the government’s attention to a perennially popular fiscal scam: Ease the pressure on household budgets with a gas tax holiday. In reality, such a plan to curry favor with voters would make them, all things considered, worse off. Responsible policymakers should have nothing to do ...

articles.title: LPG, PNG prices today: Check domestic, commercial cylinder rates in Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, other cities
articles.description: LPG, PNG Prices City Wise: The prices of petrol and diesel were increased four time in May. CNG also witnessed a price hike for the fourth time in recent 15 days. The price of 14.2 kg cooking gas cylinders remained unchanged. Check the prices of domestic LPG cylinders.

articles.title: Oil Prices Fall To $90 As Iran, US Agree To Reopen Strait Of Hormuz, Gift Nifty Signals Positive Start
articles.description: Oil prices fall below 90 as Iran and US extend ceasefire and move to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, markets eye impact on crude, gold, silver and Gift Nifty

articles.title: Global Markets Surge Amid Potential U.S.-Iran Deal
articles.description: Global stocks reached unprecedented highs as traders speculate on a potential U.S.-Iran ceasefire extension, which could reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Despite volatility in oil prices and currency values, AI-driven investments continue to bolster markets. However, analysts remain cautious about the long-term impact on inflation and interest rates.

articles.title: Commodity Corner: Oil slips, gold gains amid US-Iran ceasefire hopes
articles.description: Commodity markets witnessed mixed movement on May 29, with crude oil prices declining slightly amid optimism over a possible extension of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement. Meanwhile, gold prices edged higher due to persistent inflation concerns and expectations around U.S. interest rates.

articles.title: JD Vance Says Trump Deal Approval Is Still 'TBD' After Reports Emerge About Possible Iran Ceasefire Exten
articles.description: Stock futures slipped and oil prices fell as JD Vance said Trump has yet to approve a tentative Iran deal amid unresolved nuclear issues.

articles.title: Analysis-Trump's room to maneuver narrows as US, Iran close in on framework deal
articles.description: By Matt SpetalnickWASHINGTON, May 28 (Reuters) - President Donald Trump finds himself in a bind as he seeks to end the war against Iran: he is under pressure to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and get U.S. gasoline prices down but at the same time faces a potential backlash from Iran hawks in his own party over any concessions to Tehran.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices on May 29: How much does fuel cost in Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Kolkata and other cities
articles.description: The latest increase took cumulative fuel price hikes since May 15 to nearly ₹7.5 per litre.
